title: A Bar A Ranch ransomware incident

extortion.description: Along the banks of the North Platte River, in the heart of southern Wyoming’s Medicine Bow Mountains, lies the A Bar A Ranch. Established in 1922, it is one of the oldest guest ranches in the country. It is also one of the largest, with nearly 100,000 acres for guests and staff to explore.We are ready to upload a lo of private corporate documents including: financial data (audits, payment details, reports), contact numbers and e-mail addresses of customers and employees, insurancedocuments, lease agreements etc.
